name: slot-art-creator-node-mcp
description: Node.js MCP server for slot-art-creator — exposes nb2_generate, nb2_edit, nb2_upscale, and nb2_smart_resize tools. Either Gemini or fal.ai works fully for all four tools; with both keys set, the plugin routes generate/edit/upscale to Gemini (one fewer API hop, same NB2 model) and smart_resize to fal.ai (purpose-built NB Pro endpoint).
